10 Lorne Street, Te Aro, Wellington City

PREMIUM CAR PARKS HIT THE MARKET

Republic Apartments - Limited number available, secure this once in a life opportunity now.

(please note this is NOT an apartment for sale)

Why lease or use the bus when you can own your own freehold car park in Lorne Street, Wellington City.

Republic is a modern building with secure card access to ensure the safety of your vehicle.

Just a few minutes walk to the CBD, Willis street and Mount Victoria.

Call Leigh Adgo for more information - 021 889 261

Te Aro, Wellington City
Te Aro is a suburb which lies within the Territorial Authority of Wellington, one of 52 residential suburbs which form the wider region. Te Aro is the 3rd largest suburb of Wellington in terms of the total number of residential housing stock. Te Aro provides a range of housing stock, with the earliest residential housing recorded in the area constructed between 1880 - 1889. The majority of the residential housing stock in the locality was constructed between 2000 - 2009. Residential housing stock in Te Aro is made up of approximately 97% residential housing and 3% residential investment housing properties.
Learn more
